summary: Deferred card: harden image-build + version-bump flow from Insights report (v-prefix tag guard, post-push pull-verify, boot smoke, done-definition). Blocked on user updating MPI Kanban skills first; first action = diff skills vs candidates, apply only gaps.

Expanded scope per user: added the forgot-to-bump/rebuild net. (A) investigate full inventory of every change-type/path that needs a version bump and/or image rebuild (models, custom nodes, prompt-box tools, operation registry, node_lock, schema/comfy/app versions, builder scripts, Dockerfile). (B) advisory PostToolUse path-watch hook = non-blocking warning when a bump-trigger path is touched (reminder net, not a gate). (C) decide hook-vs-skill division; hook reminds, version-bump/build-pod-image execute.
todo -> doing (in-progress). Skills updated; picking up. First action: diffed candidate gaps vs updated build-pod-image command + version-bump/apply-patch/merge-branches/release-public skills.

maturity in-progress -> validating (stays in doing). Applied all: A bump+rebuild trigger-table.md; build-pod-image v-prefix guard + 5a public pull-verify + 5b /wrapper/stats boot smoke + done-definition; B Stop reminder hook bump-rebuild-reminder.py wired in settings.json (advisory, never blocks); C hook-vs-skill division in trigger-table. Verified: hook selftest OK, live Stop exit 0, settings JSON valid. Open: user sign-off + organic hook live-fire.

doing/validating -> done (complete, accepted). User approved full scope; organic hook live-fire waived (self-test + live Stop smoke sufficient).
